/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:03-26-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:HYDE & EDDY ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST, 1,25 HRS/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:15,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/CTORD:DO NOT CITE/
